subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, Thy servant hath taken refuge at the gate of Thine oneness, crying out for succour from the kingdom of Thy mercy, seeking illumination from the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک التجا بباب احدیتک مستغیثا الی ملکوت رحمانیتک مستضیئا من شمس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
